---
layout: cv
title: Julian Hernandez's CV
---
# Julian Hernandez
Student of Computer Science, Programmer, Returned Missionary

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/julian-hernandez-3bb6a7212/">Linkedin</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/ElReyJota">Github</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying at BYU-I

### Specialized in

Programming, Computer Science, C++, Python, C#, JS, HTML, CSS

### Key Skills
 - Leading
 - Teamwork
 - Programming
 - Problem Solving
 - Communication

### Research interests

Data science, programming, game developing.

## Education

`2022 - Now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__

## Awards

`2020`
Home on the Moon Project, *Aldrin Foundation*

## Jobs

`2023 - 2024`
__Teleperformance__, Spanish/English Interpreter

- Experience in being a bridge in communication.
- Experience in fast-paced and high-pressure environments.
- Learned communication skills.
- Learned valuable listening and note-taking skills.

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2024 -->
